title: Stock Market Analysis
summary: CFA-style equity research on a real ticker. Senior analyst uses web-search + calculator tools; writer produces a BUY/HOLD/SELL report. Baseline has no tools and hedges with generic commentary.
description: A two-agent pipeline: a senior financial analyst (maxTurns=3, READ_ONLY, temperature=0.2) pulls live pricing and financial metrics via web-search and computes ratios via calculator. An investment report writer then produces an institutional-quality memo with a BUY/HOLD/SELL recommendation and file output. The baseline LLM call answers the same prompt with no tool access — it hedges on real-time data and cannot compute ratios from current financials.
asymmetryClaim: Grounded recommendation with live metrics vs. a hedge that can't fetch or compute anything.
